title: entada goetzei subsp. lata
intro: Entada goetzei subsp. lata, also known as the African milk bush, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Entada goetzei subsp. lata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce stress. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its roots, leaves, and stems are often used in traditional remedies.
